volume_verdict: Price-led growth with flat volume. FY2025 net operating revenue grew 2%, composed of volume +1%, price/mix +4%, foreign currency -2% and acquisitions/divestitures -1%. Worldwide unit case volume was even at 33.8 billion cases against 33.7 billion, and concentrate sales volume grew 1%. Price/mix contributed four times what volume did. Volume is positive so this is not disqualifying under the Type A rule, but the franchise is not physically expanding: North America unit case volume declined 1% and Latin America concentrate volume declined 1%.

evidence.management_phrase: Volume 1% Price/Mix 4% Foreign Currency (2)% Acquisitions & Divestitures (1)% Total 2%
Unit case volume in North America decreased 1%
Unit case volume in EMEA increased 3%
